description: These slip-on sandals style heels from catwalk with the leather straps and stitch detailing are perfect for formal and casual outfits. The simple design makes for comfortable everyday dressy wear. Team these with dresses or jeans and tops.Heel: 2.5"UpperSynthetic leather upper covering the forefoot and midfootStitch detailing for added style and reinforcementSynthetic leather heel cup with cut outs on the sides for added structureElasticated loop from the heel cup to the midfoot straps for snug FitCushioned footbed in ergonomic design for extra comfort and added styleOutsoleTPU outsole with heelTextured design on forefoot and terraced grooved on heelshoe CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
